docs.title: TheBasement Codebase Documentation
docs.text:
This is documentation for the codebase behind "TheBasement" Roblox game.

Here we document all of our libraries and APIs in order to better organize our scripts for our game.

Info

This does not include the actual source scripts, but rather just examples of how to use them.

You can however use any of the example scripts freely.

The source code of the website is also free to use and is on GitHub 😋

docs.title: Libraries
docs.text: This contains all classes that are to be reused.

docs.title: APIs
docs.text: This contains all API headers that are meant to be accesss points. These access points are for different systems and data.

docs.title: State
docs.text:
Inheritable class with a Enter and Exit method:

Inherited

State is a class that must be inherited by another class to be used!

docs.title: Example Class
Methods
docs.text:
You can pass in any arguments into these methods

State:Enter(...)

State:Exit(...)

docs.title: StateMachine
docs.text: Class made to contain and switch between States:

docs.title: Constructor
docs.text:
States

A table of classes that inherit the State class.

Requires Name of Inital State and a Table of States

States Table
-- States Table Example
local States: {[string]: typeof(State)} = {
    ["Walking"] = LoadingState.new(),
    ["Running"] = RunningState.new()
}

-- Example Object Creation
local stateMachine = StateMachine.new("Walking", States, ...)

docs.title: Methods
docs.text:
You can switch states by simply calling :ChangeState("StateName", ...)

Switch State Example
stateMachine:ChangeState("Running", player)

docs.title: Signals
docs.text:
You can connect to the OnStateChange signal for event based scripts.

OnStateChange Example
stateMachine.OnStateChange:Connect(function(newState, currentState)
    if currentState.name ~= "Running" or newState.name ~= "Walking" return end
    print("Player Slowed Down :(")
end)
